# A Taste of Special Conventions

> Invitation site for A Taste of Special Conventions — an evening of association, gift exchanges, cultural cuisine, and wonderful memories on Sunday, August 30, 2026 at Eagle's Landing in La Platte, Nebraska.

## Pages

- [Invitation](/): Event overview, itinerary, dress code, gift exchanges, and entertainment.
- [Restaurants](/restaurants): Curated lineup of restaurants and cultural cuisines for the evening.
- [Pre-order cuisine](/preorder): Reserve meals from each cultural cuisine ahead of the event.
